caption: A gathering of men is seated in a formal assembly hall, with rows of green cushioned seats. Many of the men are dressed in traditional Indian attire, including white kurtas, some wearing Nehru jackets in colors such as maroon, yellow, and grey. Several men wear traditional turbans in shades of red and saffron. The individuals are seated in a structured arrangement, with some looking forward while others appear to be conversing or looking toward a central point of focus. Throughout the sequence, the people remain largely stationary in their seats, though subtle shifts in posture and head movements occur. The lighting is bright and even across the hall, and there are no visible logos, on-screen text, or pieces of electronic equipment in the shot. The scene remains consistent across the frames, capturing a moment of focused attention within the legislative environment.
